category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes travis.rb as the Travis CI Client CLI and Ruby library.
source_facts.description says it is the command-line client for Travis CI.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title/README identifies it as “Travis CI Client”.
docs_sources: Official Travis CI API docs reference travis.rb as the command-line client and Ruby library.
Official Travis CI user documentation includes Command Line Client documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/travis-ci/travis.rb; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes the project as a CLI and Ruby library for Travis CI.
source_facts.description identifies the Travis CI command-line client.
